    <item>
      <title>NBA makes discipline decision on Hornets' LaMelo Ball for dirty play on Bam Adebayo</title>
      <description>Ball is one of the Hornets' most important players, averaging 20.1 points, 7.1 assists, 4.8 rebounds and 1.2 steals per game this season.</description>

    <item>
      <title>Warriors elder statesmen's playoff experience helps stun Clippers in comeback win </title>
      <description>The Golden State Warriors had to rely on 36-year-old Draymond Green, 39-year-old Al Horford and a hobbled 38-year-old Steph Curry. Down the stretch, the trio showed their playoff pedigree to shock the Los Angeles Clippers.</description>
      <pubDate>16 Apr 2026 00:44:53 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/warriors_elder_statesmens_playoff_experience_helps_stun_clippers_in_comeback_win/s1_13132_43734140</link>

        <media:credit> Jayne Kamin-Oncea-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Golden State Warriors guard Stephen Curry. </media:title>
      </media:content>

    </item>

      <title>Prime Video's first postseason telecast has embarrassing outage</title>
      <description>During a Hornets timeout with 45 seconds left, the broadcast — Prime's first postseason NBA game — went out, replaced by a card that read "Technical Difficulties."</description>

    <item>
      <title>Suns' play-in loss highlights worrying Devin Booker trend</title>
      <description>The Phoenix Suns dropped their play-in game to the Portland Trail Blazers Tuesday night in part because Portland made almost twice as many three-point shots. The 114-110 loss forced the Suns into an elimination game on Friday and exposed an issue with the team's biggest star.</description>
      <pubDate>15 Apr 2026 18:01:45 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/suns_play_in_loss_highlights_worrying_devin_booker_trend/s1_13132_43733329</link>

        <media:credit> Mark J. Rebilas-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Phoenix Suns guard Devin Booker (1) reacts against the Portland Trail Blazers in the first half during the play-in rounds of the 2026 NBA Playoffs at Mortgage Matchup Center.  </media:title>
      </media:content>
      <category>NBA</category>
      <category>Phoenix Suns</category>
      <category>Portland Trail Blazers</category>
      <category>Devin Booker</category>
      <category>Toumani Camara</category>
    </item>

    <item>
      <title>76ers rookie VJ Edgecombe shows no fear in postseason debut</title>
      <description>Twenty-year-old VJ Edgecombe played his first NBA postseason game Wednesday night for the Philadelphia 76ers. He looked like an experienced veteran in the Sixers' 109-97 win over the Orlando Magic.</description>

      <title>Bulls are the less-heralded winners of first play-in night</title>
      <description>The Bulls weren't in the NBA's play-in tournament for the first time in four seasons. That doesn't mean they didn't have something to root for.</description>
